title: Super Bowl Search Trends in Mexico
description: Google Trends data indicates 'super bowl' is a trending search term in Mexico, with associated news coverage focusing on the 2026 World Cup final and Jennifer Hudson.

sources.title: Trump takes in Jennifer Hudson's incredible national anthem performance before World Cup final
What to know about Jennifer Hudson: National anthem performer at World Cup final
Who will sing the national anthems before Spain vs Argentina in the 2026 World Cup final?

sections.heading: Search Data Overview
paragraphs: According to the Google report, 'super bowl' is a trending search term in the region of Mexico. The data indicates a search lower bound of 2,000, with a trend feed published on July 19, 2026.

sections.heading: News Coverage on Performances
paragraphs: The news coverage linked to this search term includes reports about the World Cup final. According to Fox News, Trump watched Jennifer Hudson's national anthem performance before the World Cup final. Additionally, USA Today provided information about Jennifer Hudson as the national anthem performer at the event.

sections.heading: Match Details
paragraphs: World Soccer Talk reported on the national anthem singers for the match between Spain and Argentina in the 2026 World Cup final. This article appears in the news feed associated with the 'super bowl' search term.

faq.a: According to the Google report, the search lower bound is 2,000.

faq.a: According to the provided facts, articles from Fox News, USA Today, and World Soccer Talk regarding the 2026 World Cup final and Jennifer Hudson are linked to this search term.
